name: Arjuna
description: The great hero of the Indian epic, the Mahabharata. The Mahabharata is a dazzling story where the heroes of India gather, and it's no exaggeration to say that Arjuna is at the center of them all. __In Fate/Grand Order Cosmos in the Lostbelt:__ ~!Known as God Arjuna in life, Arjuna Alter is a version of Arjuna that absorbed all the gods of the Hindu pantheon (with exception of Ganesha and Kama), losing most of his humanity in the process and became the last god in the Indian Lostbelt.!~

name: Cal Devens
nativeName: キャル・ディヴェンス
description: Younger sister of Judy Devens. A young girl that tried to hire Zwei (aka Reiji), thinking he was a killer for justice, by using money she had unknowingly stolen from Inferno. Reiji tries to hide her from Inferno but is unsuccessful and in a move to save her life asks that she becomes his assistant. ~!After an attempt on his life, Reiji took her for dead and was forced to leave America to go into hiding. name: Chae-A Han
description: After serving a 7 year prison sentence for an attempted murder, Chae Ah works as a taxi driver.

name: Chris Redfield
description: A senior member of an elite security force in Racoon City, S.T.A.R.S. A member of Team 1, the pride of S.T.A.R.S. for its competence in shooting and close combat. He is also the older brother of Claire Redfield. He appears in the original Resident Evil, Resident Evil Code Veronica, Resident Evil 5, Resident Evil 6, Resident Evil 7: Biohazard, and Resident Evil: Village.

name: Chuck
description: The pet (?) kept by [Panty](https://anilist.co/character/32800/Panty-Anarchy) and [Stocking.](https://anilist.co/character/32801/Stocking-Anarchy) It’s hard to figure out what it’s thinking. It often gets awful treatment from the angel sisters. The creators highly based this character on GIR from Invader ZIM.

description: He is the second prince and second king of the Bosse Kingdom. He is the son of Bosse and Hilling, and the younger brother of Bojji.

description: Dorian is a great Chinese Kenpo fighter from the United States. Of all the five convicts, he is most notable for using a wide variety of tools during fights, such as flammable materials and lightweight wire.

name: Enishi Yukishiro
description: When Enishi was an infant, his mother died and he was raised by his older sister, Tomoe. She raised him herself, becoming both sister and mother to him, and he grew to love her quite dearly. When Tomoe became engaged to Kiyosato Akira, Enishi reluctantly accepted him because Kiyosato truly made Tomoe happy and she loved him. description: [Takashi](https://anilist.co/character/284469/Takashi-Morita)'s mother.

name: Evergreen
description: Evergreen (Ebāgurīn) is a 20 year-old member of Fairy Tail and a member of the team, Raijinshuu. As a child, it was her dream to be a fairy, so she joined Fairy Tail only for the name, with no interest in other things. She was lonely and anti-social as a child, due to her eyes being able to turn others into stone when looking into them. Her glasses suppress and control it because of its immense power. name: Genba Kazama
description: A thief that belongs to the Kazama clan, a branch of the Suwa clan. He is a member of the Elusive Warriors.

name: Homare Byobugaura
description: A student in Shiki's class, as well as his love interest. In her past, she was heavily abused by her parents, leaving her constantly apologetic and self-deprecating. Her Blood Eclipse Release manifests as the "Blood Titan", a gargantuan, ghoul-like representation of her sister, who used to protect her from their parents before being killed by their father.

description: She is a journalist, as well as the ex-wife of Max and mother of Michael.

name: Jun Shiratori
description: Jun Shiratori was a food delivery worker in Satoru's hometown and often approached lone students around his house. He was nicknamed "Yuuki" because he was always encouraging the children to be courageous. He was originally framed as the killer of the three kidnapped students in the town and sentenced to death.

name: Kaede Sajou
description: She is the older sister of Wataru and also the vice president of the student council.

name: Kaien Shiba
description: __Height:__ 183 cm (6'0") Kaien Shiba was the lieutenant of the 13th Division, under Juushiro Ukitake, up until his death at the hands of a Hollow that also killed his wife, Miyako Shiba. Kaien, a very ethical man, was adored by many of the 13th Division members. He was outspoken and bore a rough disposition, but his down-to-earth attitude was one of the reasons why everyone looked up to him. Kaien treated his fellow company members indiscriminately, regardless of their social standing or rank.

name: Karura
description: Karura was once princess of Na-Tunku before she was taken down and replaced with a puppet of the Shakukoporu. She is found after killing many enemy soldiers *with her bare hands* in order to escape. Even though she's royalty, she decides to live a "normal" life as "Karura", serving Hakuoro. She and her brother are the last two Giriyaginas on Earth. Her superhuman strength let her wield a ridiculously heavy sword, thus making her a very effective shock troop, acting more like Hakuowlo's tank on t

name: Klabautermann
description: Klabautermann is a water sprite (or nix) who assists sailors and fishermen on the Baltic Sea in their duties. He is a merry and diligent creature, with an expert understanding of most watercraft, and an unsurpassed musical talent. He also rescues sailors washed overboard. His image is of a small sailor in yellow with a tobacco pipe and woolen sailor's cap. This likeness is carved and attached to the mast as a symbol of good luck.
